completeness.headline: Profile at {{percent}}%
completeness.missingIntro_one: You're {{count}} field away from completing your profile.
completeness.missingIntro_other: You're {{count}} fields away from completing your profile.
completeness.doneSubtitle: Thanks for keeping your information up to date.

personType.title: Person type
personType.subtitle: Tell us whether you're shopping as an individual or on behalf of a business.
personType.INDIVIDUAL.title: Individual
personType.BUSINESS.title: Business
personType.BUSINESS.description: A company, workshop, or commercial client.

clientType.title: Client type
clientType.subtitle: Pick the option that best describes what you do.
clientType.error: Could not load the list. Please try again.

phone.title: Change phone
phone.subtitle: We'll send a 6-digit code to verify the new number.

errors.sendFailed: We couldn't send the code. Check the number and try again.
errors.verifyFailed: The code didn't match. Try again.
errors.syncFailed: Verified, but we couldn't sync the phone. Please retry.

email.title: Change email
email.subtitle: The email you use to sign in will update too.

errors.inUse: This email is already linked to another client.

fiscalDoc.title: Fiscal document
fiscalDoc.subtitle: Prefix plus 6 to 12 digits, e.g. V-12345678.

errors.invalid: Format must be V/E/J/G/P followed by 6–12 digits.
errors.inUse: This fiscal document is already registered.

address.title: Shipping address
address.subtitle: Where should we ship your orders?
address.addressPlaceholder: Av. Francisco de Miranda, Edif. Parque Cristal…

flowChoice.title: Where would you like to go?
flowChoice.subtitle: Your account has access to both the customer experience and the admin tools.
flowChoice.client.title: Continue as customer
flowChoice.client.subtitle: Browse the catalog, manage orders and your profile.
flowChoice.admin.title: Go to admin mode
flowChoice.admin.subtitle: In-transit, transfers, and operations for staff.
flowChoice.remember: You can switch anytime from your profile.

logoutConfirm.title: Log out?
logoutConfirm.message: You'll need to sign in again to access your profile.

errors.saveFailed: We couldn't save your changes. Please try again.
